title: Corpuscularia lehmannii

The classification of Corpuscularia lehmannii includes its placement within the genus Corpuscularia, which is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only this single species. Corpuscularia lehmannii is further classified under the family Aizoaceae, which is commonly known as the ice plant family. intro: Corpuscularia lehmannii, also known as 'Kokerboom,' is a succulent plant native to South Africa, characterized by its unique and striking appearance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can aid in wound healing and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
